arts.sum: PSV Eindhoven, currently top of the Eredivisie, are currently sat 18th in the UEFA Champions League table with eight points. In order to ensure their qualification for the next round,…

arts.ttl: Brest predicted XI v PSV: Ludovic Ajorque and Romain Faivre out
arts.sum: Stade Brestois are without a whole host of first-teamers as they look to return to winning ways in the UEFA Champions League when they face PSV Eindhoven on Tuesday night. …

arts.ttl: PSV name Veerman and Schouten in Champions League squad for Brest clash
arts.sum: PSV have revealed their 21-man squad for their trip to France for their crucial Champions League clash with Stade Brest.
